Per spec: "each item in a quote is treated as a first insurance, regardless of customer history". 
Two plain items (sword + amulet): policy base = 160. First insurance is +10% per item, so +16 (10% of 160). +5 fee = 181G total.
This is already covered (the existing INSURANCE_SURCHARGE_RATE 0.1 is computed as 10% of itemsBase).

Use:
```ts
quote({yearsWithMHPCO: 0}, [
  {type: "sword", material: "steel", enchantment: 0, cursed: false},
  {type: "amulet", material: "silver", enchantment: 0, cursed: false}
]) === 181
```

You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation
Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
